title: Tailwind For Chinese Coal Imports
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Executive Report, China's coal production averaged 381.5 million tons in January/February. This is 55.5 million tons (-12%) less than was produced in December and is down year-on-year by 1.2 million tons. Very significant is that China's coal production has now contracted on a year-on-year basis for eight straight months.
